race.description: Rabbit Ride Share Country Boosted (Bm58) Hcp
race.comment: AUTUMN MISS (3) raced on the speed and proved a shade too strong in a similar race to this at Casino last start. That run followed a 38-day let-up so there is more to come. Has plenty of weight but Nash will get the best out of her. VETOED (11) showed the benefits of a six-week freshen up when she led all the way and scored with authority over 1250m at Ballina last time out. Only third-up today so she can improve further. BARCELONA EXPRESS (4) settled midfield then battled on fairly for a distant third over this trip at Taree recently. Finding success hard to come by but he should be about the money again. CRITICAL TIME (10) has been disappointing of late but is very fit and might be looking for today's journey at this stage of the campaign. PICUPSTIXX (8) closed strongly to just get up over 1215m here last time. This trip has been a problem before but he looks ready for another crack.
